name: views
title: Views
description: Views as records: a universal renderer reads one view's blocks and draws the page. Editing this record edits the page -- no deploy, no hand-written mount.

fields.name: route
fields.label: Route
fields.help: optional site path, e.g. /stuck; served via site_routes

fields.name: blocks
fields.label: Blocks
fields.help: JSON list of block descriptors, validated server-side. Each block has a "kind" of list, form, detail, count, or markdown -- unknown kinds render as a placeholder, never as raw markup.

fields.name: pinned
fields.label: Pinned
fields.help: pinned views appear in the nav Apps switcher
